summary: Password reset feature fully tested and working. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with 'Mot de passe oublié ?' link on login page, forgot-password page, and reset-password page all functional.
critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED: Email sending for password reset is mocked - token is returned in API response for testing purposes (to remove in production)
Token expiry correctly set to 1 hour
Password minimum length validation (6 chars) implemented on both frontend and backend
Token reuse prevention works correctly - used tokens are marked and rejected
Generic message for non-existent emails prevents email enumeration attacks
Password strength indicator on reset-password page provides good UX feedback
seed_data_creation: Test user reset-test@djbooking.com verified/created for password reset tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Password reset feature fully functional. Email sending is MOCKED - reset_token returned in API response for testing. Test user: reset-test@djbooking.com with password: newpassword123
api_endpoints_tested: POST /api/auth/login - Verify login with new password

mocked_apis.email_sending: Email sending is mocked - reset_token is returned in API response for testing. In production, this should send an actual email.
